user.title: Mortify Setup
user.description: Mortify uses your existing Ollama conversation agents — no extra configuration needed. Just set your HA URL for QR codes.

data.ha_url: Home Assistant URL (for player QR codes)

data_description.tts_entity: Leave blank to use the speaker selected in-game. Example: tts.google_en_com
data_description.ha_url: The URL your guests use to reach HA. Example: http://192.168.1.100:8123

create_entry.default: Mortify is ready. Open the sidebar and select an Ollama model to start your mystery.

data.ha_url: Home Assistant URL (for player QR codes)
